home.title: Hi, I'm Pedro
home.subtitle: Software Developer / Machine Learning / Web Development
home.desc1: I am a university student passionate about technology and software development, with a particular interest in Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence. I enjoy exploring different programming languages and tools, and I am always eager to learn new technologies that allow me to understand and apply advanced concepts in a practical way.
home.desc2: I am motivated to participate in projects that have a real impact, where I can apply my knowledge to solve problems and improve processes. I seek opportunities that allow me to grow professionally, learn from collaborative experiences, and continue developing my technical skills in dynamic environments.
home.desc3: I am currently pursuing a degree in Computer Engineering at the University of the Republic (UDELAR), where I am developing skills in programming, algorithms, information systems, and emerging technologies.
home.librecourse1: LibreCourse is an open-source Django application for creating, organizing, and collaborating on courses.
home.librecourse2: It’s designed to empower educators, learners, and communities by providing a flexible, modern platform to share knowledge freely.
home.mailter: Pigeon is a web extension designed for the automatic classification of emails using Python-based Machine Learning. It features a backend built with FastAPI, which processes data and delivers results quickly and efficiently, enabling intelligent email organization for users.
home.nauta1: Nauta is a pixel art RPG developed in Godot, inspired by classic RPGs but with a reinvented approach.
home.nauta2: The game features a vast, living world filled with lovable characters, interconnected stories, and environments that encourage constant exploration.
